_comment: Example data for templates/commissioner-letter.html. Copy this, change the values, run: node scripts/render.js commissioner-letter data/your-file.json --out output. Fictional names throughout — for a real send with real names and real links, use a local-only data file instead (see local/README.md).
thanks_body_html: Congratulations again to Sofa Kings on last year's title — that was a season for the books. Looking forward to another great one.
lookahead_body_html: Before we get 2026 on the calendar, a few things need your input.

topics.heading: Are You In?
topics.body_html: Let me know if you're back for another season, or if it's time to pass your spot along. Either way, I need to know before I finalize the field.

topics.heading: Rule Changes
topics.body_html: If something bugged you last year, or you've got ideas to make things better this year, I want to hear it — so we can bring it to the group.

topics.heading: The Buy-In
topics.body_html: It's been $25 for as long as anyone can remember. Tell me if it should stay, go up, or come down — I'll review everyone's input before setting it for the year.

draft_note_html: More on draft night — date, time, and format — as we get closer to kickoff.
closing_body_html: Excited for what this season has in store. See you in the group chat.
footer_line: Lawson Family & Friends Fantasy League · Est. 2020
